user.title: Connect to SoundSticks 5
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your SoundSticks 5 speaker.

zeroconf_confirm.title: SoundSticks 5 discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: Found "{name}" on your network. Continue setup?

cert.title: Client certificate
cert.description: Paste the cert.pem and key.pem generated by scripts/extract_cert.py (see the integration README for how to extract these from the Harman Kardon One app).

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the speaker. Check the host and that it's powered on and on the same network.
error.invalid_cert: The certificate/key was rejected by the speaker. Re-run scripts/extract_cert.py and try again.

abort.not_soundsticks: The discovered device did not respond like a SoundSticks 5 speaker.
